semantic.role: Issue template for suggesting documentation improvements
responsibilities: Providing a structured format for users to report documentation problems
Collecting links to pages needing improvement

English.purpose: To facilitate community contributions to the project's documentation by providing a clear template for suggesting improvements.
English.context_and_audience: This template is intended for contributors and users of ArchSpine who encounter issues with README, docs, examples, or website copy and want to suggest specific edits.
key_takeaways: Users can specify which page needs work
Users can describe what should change

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 为社区贡献文档改进提供结构化模板，便于用户清晰描述问题。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 此模板面向 ArchSpine 的贡献者和用户，当他们发现 README、文档、示例或网站内容有问题时，可以通过这个模板提出具体的编辑建议。
key_takeaways: 用户可指明需要改进的页面
用户可描述期望的更改
